_description: Registry of journalists, news organizations, and researchers whose use of or citation of a corpus upgrades its provenance tag from PROVENANCE_UNVERIFIED to PROVENANCE_COMMUNITY_VOUCHED. Maintain this list carefully — an endorser's trustworthiness is what gives the upgrade meaning.
_note: Endorsement is not the same as verification. A COMMUNITY_VOUCHED corpus has been used or cited by a trusted source AND has passed sequence reconciliation. It does not mean the corpus has been cryptographically verified against DOJ originals.
_cited_corpora_note: cited_corpora is a list of GitHub URLs of corpora this endorser has explicitly used or cited. A corpus matching one of these URLs receives PROVENANCE_COMMUNITY_VOUCHED if it also passes sequence reconciliation.

endorsers.name: NPR (National Public Radio)
endorsers.notes: Published February 2026 investigation identifying ~53 missing pages via serial number, discovery log, and document stamp reconciliation. Methodology documented and replicable.

endorsers.name: MuckRock
endorsers.notes: Specialist FOIA and government document platform. Document releases verified against original filings.

endorsers.name: Wall Street Journal
endorsers.notes: March 2026 reporting on 47,635 files held offline and selective withholding of Trump-related FBI 302s. Obtained direct DOJ confirmation of withholdings.

endorsers.name: rhowardstone (independent data scientist)
endorsers.notes: Forensic analysis of full 12-dataset DOJ release: 1,380,937 PDFs, 2,731,785 pages, full-text SQLite corpus with FTS5, EFTA dataset mapping, knowledge graph, entity registry. Self-described as not independently human-verified. EFTA gap analysis confirmed 100% completeness within dataset boundaries. Cited corpus: rhowardstone/Epstein-research-data.
